candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line tied to cost of revenues, but it appears as a component beneath/alongside the broader selected COGS bucket 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / cost of revenues total, so adding it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the only SG&A-related D&A line visible in the operating section, but it is shown as a sub-component of SG&A and appears blank in the preview, so there is no clear separate amount to add outside the selected SG&A bucket.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses'. In the excerpt, no populated separate SG&A D&A line appears outside that bucket. The visible SG&A amortization row is blank and reads like a component of SG&A, so the conservative no-double-count treatment is to add nothing separately.
